name: I hurt my shoulder at work but have old arthritis—will they pay?

mainEntity.name: I hurt my shoulder at work but have old arthritis—will they pay?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, covers aggravation—doc links it to work.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes if work aggravated it; comp covers aggravation of pre-existing conditions. Key factors: Doctor must link worsening to job; no need to prove 100% caused by work. Medical opinion crucial. Get independent exam if disputed; attorney fights denials.

description: Yes, covers aggravation—doc links it to work.
